input_question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
decomposed_queries: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
top_candidate_question: From ipilimumab melanoma trials, which have an overall follow-up duration greater than 21 months, list the Name of ICI and overall follow-up duration?
top_candidate_sql: SELECT "Name of ICI", "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;
